case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. DAVID GREGORY ROTH

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT, AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROTH, DAVID GREGORY (SBN 123893) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
